name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
🍃🍃👜👜 【2020 Summer New Kaia Small】🦩The new Kaia saddle bag for Summer 2020 features a round and compact design that is simple yet chic. Crafted from smooth plant-tanned calfskin in a minimalist style, the gold YSL logo buckle stands out! The small and round appearance is retro yet cool. Model: 619740.JD 🍁 Dimensions: 18x15.5x5.5cm
